raw.message: Get 100 Free Spins if you deposit & play £10 on slots. Sound like your kind of fun?

hook.summary: A man looks at the camera followed by a woman laughing in a giant yellow chair.
hook.visual_action: Close-up of a man, then a wide shot of a woman playing on her phone in a fuzzy yellow beanbag.
hook.text_overlay: WHERE A LITTLE Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY
hook.voiceover_transcript: Join Gala to enjoy a daily dose of free bingo.

scene_flow: Close-up of a man looking directly at the camera.
A woman laughs while playing on her phone in a large, yellow, fuzzy chair.
The brand logo 'Gala' appears on a solid yellow background.
A black screen displays a responsible gambling message: 'TAKE TIME TO THINK'.
on_screen_text: 18+. From 19/11/25. Daily Free Bingo Room games run every 5 minutes from 00:00 to 23:55 (UK Time). Max 6 tickets per player/game. Prizes are Gala Points. Restrictions & T&Cs apply.
WHERE A LITTLE Gala JOY GOES A LONG WAY
audience_proxy: UK adults 18+ who enjoy casual social gaming and bingo.
